question: I have a half-formed Stellar product idea. What repeatable workflow turns it into primitives, prior-art choices, a stack, and first build steps?

golden.answer: Use Stellar Builder Quickstart: clarify the idea, map it to Stellar primitives, search LumenLoop for prior art, prefer integration where an existing project covers part of the need, choose the contract/token/frontend/data/oracle/SEP stack, and emit a concise build plan with deeper build references. LumenLoop supports discovery; implementation guidance comes from the relevant build skills and official docs.
keyFacts: Maps the idea to explicit Stellar primitives before choosing a stack.
Checks ecosystem prior art and produces a build plan that routes to deeper implementation references.
avoid: Do NOT recommend rebuilding an existing integration without checking prior art.
Do NOT treat LumenLoop directory summaries as contract implementation guidance.
golden.notes: Best-source case for the bundled Stellar Builder Quickstart skill.

sources.note: Fetch-verified local path exists and defines the exercised contract/workflow.
